title: Marvel Metals
description:
Marvel Metals  adds powerful, hero-inspired metals and alloys into Minecraft.

Discover rare ores deep underground, craft advanced tools and armor  based on legendary comic style materials
body:
Marvel Metals expands Minecraft with a collection of new, Marvel-inspired ores and metals that bring a fresh progression path to your survival world. Dive into the depths, explore dangerous caves, and uncover powerful materials based on iconic comic-universe metals — all reimagined in a Minecraft-friendly, vanilla-styled way.

This mod introduces multiple new ores that generate naturally across different layers of the world. Each ore can be mined, smelted, or processed into its own ingots and crafting components. With these materials, you can create full toolsets and armor sets that offer new visual variety and give players more options as they advance through their world.

The focus of Marvel Metals is to provide fresh content and new resources without changing the core gameplay, making it perfect for players who enjoy new mining progression, aesthetic variety, and themed gear while keeping the balance of vanilla Minecraft intact.

Whether you’re upgrading your equipment, decorating storage rooms with new items, or simply exploring your caves in search of rare metals, Marvel Metals seamlessly integrates into your world and keeps your adventure feeling rewarding and exciting.

🌟 What’s Inside

Multiple Marvel-inspired ores added to world generation

Raw ore items + refined ingots for each metal

Complete toolsets (pickaxe, axe, sword, shovel, hoe)

Full armor sets that match the style of their materials

Textures made to fit the vanilla aesthetic

Balanced ore generation that scales with progression

NeoForge support for compatibility with modern modpacks

🗺️ World Generation

Each ore appears at different depths and spawn rates, giving you reasons to explore more biomes, dig deeper, or hunt for rare materials. The ores blend naturally into the world and don’t overwhelm caves or clutter your terrain.

🎨 Art & Style

All textures — from ores to armor — are created to match Minecraft’s original look, keeping everything clean, simple, and consistent. Whether you're adding them to a survival world or a big modpack, the materials fit right in.

🛠️ Compatibility

Marvel Metals is built for NeoForge and works well alongside most worldgen or progression mods. It does not alter vanilla gameplay mechanics, making it easy to drop into any pack without conflict.

❗ Disclaimer

**This project is entirely unofficial and not affiliated with Marvel, Disney, or any related brands. All names are used for fan-themed inspiration only.**
